headline: Bank of America Sees Interest Rates Exploding Higher Soon: Play It Safe With 4 Dividend Giants
summary: Bank of America has predicted that the Federal Reserve will be forced to raise interest rates by 75 basis points this year, with the first 25-basis-point hike in September. They also see additional 25-basis-point hikes in October and December. The energy shock from the war with Iran drove inflation higher, with the CPI rising in ...
